housing.error.visit_read_only: Visitors can look around, but only the owner can build.

housing.locked_mvp: Housing opens in the next MVP slice.
housing.catalog_hint: Choose furniture, then tap a tile to build.

housing.selected_existing_format: Selected: {item}. Tap an empty tile to move it.
housing.selected_format: Selected: {item}. Tap a room tile to build.
housing.placed_format: Placed {item}. Choose another item or move it.
housing.undo_ready_format: Edit saved. Undo covers this last move or rotate.

housing.item.potted_plant.description: A small plant that brightens a room.

housing.item.simple_chair.description: A compact chair for any starter home.

housing.item.starter_wallpaper.descripti: A clean wall pattern for new rooms.

housing.item.tiny_table.description: A small table for snacks and decorations.

housing.item.wall_shelf.description: A small shelf for keepsakes and tools.

housing.item.wooden_floor.description: A warm floor pattern for new rooms.

minigame.tile_dash.description: Race across changing tiles and reach the goal.
minigame.tile_dash.name: Tile Dash
login.maintenance.detail: The town is being tuned. Please try again soon.
login.maintenance.title: Town Maintenance
login.title: Pixel Social World
login.version_blocked.detail_format: Current version {current}. Required version {minimum}. Please refresh after updating.
login.version_blocked.title: Update Needed
npc.duty.fisher: Keeps the pier route clear and points players toward first catches.
npc.duty.merchant: Handles starter goods, furniture hints, and market flow.
npc.duty.trade_broker: Keeps listings readable, watches price flow, and points players to buy and sell rows.
npc.duty.workshop_master: Keeps crafting benches, smithy routes, and material handoffs organized.
npc.duty.mine_foreman: Keeps crystal tunnels safe and tracks mining node handoffs.
npc.duty.guild_coordinator: Prepares group boards, gathering spaces, and social route prompts.
npc.duty.mail_courier: Tracks mailbox notices and social delivery points.
npc.duty.game_host: Opens public rooms and routes players into hosted minigames.
npc.duty.home_keeper: Guides room editing, decoration, and cozy home loops.
npc.duty.event_guide: Summarizes events, rotations, and creator updates.
npc.duty.creator_tutor: Explains upload rules, contract signals, and review basics.
npc.duty.academy_registrar: Organizes lessons, campus notices, and creator help.
npc.duty.snow_guide: Marks safe winter routes and snow festival stops.
npc.duty.winter_innkeeper: Keeps a warm rest point between snowy routes.
npc.duty.festival_host: Coordinates seasonal boards, gathering spots, and mini events.
npc.duty.booth_keeper: Directs visitors to quick games and event booths.
npc.duty.stage_manager: Keeps performance paths open for crowds and emotes.
npc.duty.herbalist: Teaches safe gathering routes and rare sprout hints.
npc.duty.lumber_foreman: Checks stump markers, clear paths, and return routes.
npc.duty.farm_keeper: Tracks crop refreshes, harvest rhythm, and plot space.
npc.duty.bug_keeper: Points out flower routes, tall grass, and sparkle trails.
npc.duty.archaeologist: Guides ruin scans, tablets, and patient discovery.
npc.duty.chef_guide: Connects ingredients, warm meals, and small social buffs.
npc.event_guide.dialogue: The town board tracks events, creator games, and festival notices.
npc.event_guide.name: Notice Guide
npc.fisher.dialogue: Fish are biting at the pier. Tap the Fishing Pier when you are ready.
npc.fisher.name: Pier Fisher
npc.game_host.dialogue: Game Hall keeps open sessions together. Host Fishing or join a room.
npc.game_host.name: Game Host
npc.home_keeper.dialogue: Home building spends coins, but your room layout is yours to shape.
npc.home_keeper.name: Home Keeper
npc.mail_courier.dialogue: Mail and friend notices will arrive here once the social loop opens.
npc.mail_courier.name: Mail Courier
npc.creator_tutor.dialogue: Creator Gallery collects the upload contract, mode rules, and review signals for player-made games.
npc.creator_tutor.name: Creator Tutor
npc.academy_registrar.dialogue: Academy Plaza keeps lessons, creator help, and campus notices organized.
npc.academy_registrar.name: Academy Registrar
npc.archaeologist.dialogue: The dig site rewards patient scanning. Check ruins, tablets, and quiet corners.
npc.archaeologist.name: Archaeologist
npc.booth_keeper.dialogue: The festival booths point visitors toward quick games and event rooms.
npc.booth_keeper.name: Booth Keeper
npc.bug_keeper.dialogue: Insects gather around flowers and tall grass. Move slowly and watch for sparkle trails.
npc.bug_keeper.name: Bug Keeper
npc.chef_guide.dialogue: Cooking stations trade ingredients for warm meals and small social buffs.
npc.chef_guide.name: Chef Guide
npc.farm_keeper.dialogue: Farm plots refresh on a calm rhythm. Harvest what is ready and leave room for growth.
npc.farm_keeper.name: Farm Keeper
npc.festival_host.dialogue: Festival maps rotate seasonal boards, mini events, and gathering spots.
npc.festival_host.name: Festival Host
npc.herbalist.dialogue: Herb nodes are safer near paths, but the rarer sprouts sit closer to water and stones.
npc.herbalist.name: Herbalist
npc.lumber_foreman.dialogue: Good lumber runs need clear paths, marked stumps, and a tidy return route.
npc.lumber_foreman.name: Lumber Foreman
npc.trade_broker.dialogue: The board is live. Check buyable rows first, then your listings and sellable items.
npc.trade_broker.name: Trade Broker
npc.workshop_master.dialogue: Workbench routes are marked. Crafting rewards will plug into the economy loop here.
npc.workshop_master.name: Workshop Master
npc.mine_foreman.dialogue: Follow the lit path and work the marked crystal nodes. The reward loop is almost wired.
npc.mine_foreman.name: Mine Foreman
npc.guild_coordinator.dialogue: This garden is for groups, invites, and future guild boards. Keep the center clear for gatherings.
npc.guild_coordinator.name: Guild Coordinator
npc.snow_guide.dialogue: Snowbell paths can look soft, but the marked road keeps you off the frozen roofs.
npc.snow_guide.name: Snow Guide
npc.stage_manager.dialogue: Stage events need space. Keep the front path clear for crowds and emotes.
npc.stage_manager.name: Stage Manager
npc.winter_innkeeper.dialogue: The inn keeps travelers warm between snow festival stops.
npc.winter_innkeeper.name: Winter Innkeeper
npc.merchant.dialogue: The shop is stocking starter goods. Save a few coins for furniture.
npc.merchant.name: Item Merchant

mail.welcome.subject: Welcome home
mail.welcome.body: Your starter room is ready. Visit Home to place furniture and spend coins.
mail.game_hall.subject: Fishing tables open
mail.game_hall.body: The Game Hall can host Fishing sessions. Try one when the town is quiet.
notice.creator_alpha.subject: Creator alpha prep
notice.creator_alpha.body: Official minigames define the first upload contract before player-made games open.
notice.housing_beta.subject: Housing build test
notice.housing_beta.body: Starter furniture uses the same coin sink that will support the live economy.
world.session_invite_chat_format: {name} is hosting {game}. Join from the room panel.
world.session_invite_chip_tooltip: Join the latest room minigame invite.
world.panel.action.creator: Creator
world.panel.creator.title: Creator Lab
world.panel.creator.detail: Pick a mode first. Each upload still uses IMinigame, SubViewport sandboxing, manifest validation, and review.
creator.contract.manifest.detail: meta.json must include game_id, version, author, mode_id, en/ja/zh name, player range, runtime_contract, entry scene, main script, and asset budget.
creator.contract.manifest.title: Manifest Contract
creator.contract.security.detail: No OS, filesystem, raw network, root-node access, or external APIs. Assets must stay as pixel PNG/WebP within the package budget.
creator.contract.security.title: Sandbox Review
creator.submission.draft.title: Draft Review Probe
creator.submission.status.offline: Draft check is waiting for backend connection.
creator.package.status.offline: Package upload is waiting for backend connection.
creator.package.title: Package Intake Probe

creator.reviewer.title: Review Signals
creator.status.detail_format: Versions: {versions} · Latest: v{version} · {status} · Scan {scan} · AI {ai} · Install {install}
creator.status.offline: History is waiting for backend connection.
creator.status.title: Creator Status Page
reviewer.console.confirm_required_format: Click {action} again to confirm this high-risk action.
reviewer.console.detail: Human review, install, rollback, and unpublish controls.

ops.console.detail: Room, chat, realtime, and reward counters.
ops.console.inventory.audit_empty: Enter a player ID to inspect inventory locks.
ops.console.inventory.audit_no_items: No inventory rows for this player.
ops.console.inventory.audit_summary: Inventory: owned {owned} · locked {locked} · available {available} · housing {housing} · trade {trade} · legacy {legacy}

ops.console.row.realtime: Realtime: {a} delivered · {b} move limits · {c} emote limits

liveops.console.ready: Creator review and chat moderation are available.
liveops.console.ready_role_format: LiveOps ready · role {role} · risky actions require confirmation.
liveops.console.role_format: Admin role: {role}. Risky actions require confirmation.
liveops.console.title: LiveOps Console
creator.mode.2d_fighting.name: 2D Fighting
creator.mode.2d_fighting.summary: Side-view duels or small team fights with hitboxes, hurtboxes, input buffers, combo rules, and round timers.
creator.mode.battle_royale.name: Battle Royale
creator.mode.battle_royale.summary: Elimination sessions with shrinking zones, light loot, and server authority from the start.
creator.mode.casual_activity.name: Casual Activity
creator.mode.casual_activity.summary: Small social games like fishing, matching, rhythm taps, or festival booths.
creator.mode.rpg_adventure.name: RPG Adventure
creator.mode.rpg_adventure.summary: Top-down quests, light combat, dialogue, and co-op room moments.
creator.mode.side_scroller_2d.name: Side-Scrolling 2D
creator.mode.side_scroller_2d.summary: Pixel action stages with platforms, enemies, hazards, and bounded 2D cameras.
creator.mode.strategy_war.name: War Strategy
creator.mode.strategy_war.summary: Grid or isometric unit command games with deterministic turns or locked ticks.
creator.mode.tower_defense.name: Tower Defense
creator.mode.tower_defense.summary: Wave defense games with path grids, tower placement, upgrades, and reward pacing.
